title: 52 Hearts
lyric:
[00:00.000] 作词 : Bao The Whale
[00:01.000] 作曲 : Pretty Patterns
[00:49.650]Breathe in the sea
[00:59.120]Free from the grief
[01:09.280]Part of me
[01:13.040]wish I could be fine
[01:18.880]All of me
[01:23.040]doesn't wanna cross that line
[01:29.200]But when the stars that fall
[01:32.320]bring all but broken promises
[01:35.760]Would you believe in me?
[01:40.200]And when you hear that call
[01:42.800]Pray that my metamorphoses
[01:46.000]Is all that I need
[01:49.840]If I could float up in the atmosphere
[01:55.440]Would anyone know that I’m hiding here
[02:00.320]The deeper I sink
[02:03.040]all I can think of is you
[02:10.160]A melody so sad...It drove me to tears
[02:15.680]The message in a bottle disappeared
[02:20.400]The deeper I sink
[02:23.120]All I can think of is you
[02:30.240]Dream...Endlessly
[02:40.160]Fall...
[02:44.240]Fast asleep
[02:50.240]A song
[02:54.480]that falls on deaf ears
[03:00.640]I hope
[03:04.320]one day you will hear
[03:07.600]my silent symphony
[03:11.040]I've been waiting all this time
[03:15.680]for you to come
[03:17.760]and save my life
[03:20.560]But every time you’d drift away
[03:25.520]And dawn turned to night
[03:30.640]If I could float up in the atmosphere
[03:36.080]Would anyone know that I’m hiding here
[03:41.280]The deeper I sink
[03:44.160]all I can think of is you
[03:51.280]A melody so sad...It drove me to tears
[03:56.320]The message in a bottle disappeared
[04:01.440]The deeper I sink
[04:04.160]All I can think of is you
sub_lyric:
[by:聖者的受難]
[00:49.650]喘息于深海之下
[00:59.120]逃离累累的伤痛
[01:09.280]与其说
[01:13.040]我希望能够活着
[01:18.880]倒不如说
[01:23.040]我害怕越过生与死的边界
[01:29.200]星陨如雨
[01:32.320]留下的只有破碎的誓言
[01:35.760]你还会相信我吗
[01:40.200]当你听到我的呼唤时
[01:42.800]为我的解脱而祈祷
[01:46.000]这就是我所需要的一切
[01:49.840]如果我能于天空中游弋
[01:55.440]届时会有人注意到我吗
[02:00.320]在沉沦中
[02:03.040]挥之不去的是你的身影
[02:10.160]传来的悲歌催我泪下
[02:15.680]瓶中之语再无传达之时
[02:20.400]在沉沦中
[02:23.120]挥之不去的是你的身影
[02:30.240]无尽的幻梦
[02:40.160]堕坠
[02:44.240]就这样陷入永眠
[02:50.240]深海中的歌声
[02:54.480]从我失聪的双耳旁流过
[03:00.640]我多希望
[03:04.320]有那么一天你也能够听到
[03:07.600]我无声的交响乐
[03:11.040]我此生都在等待着这一时刻
[03:15.680]等待着你的到来
[03:17.760]等待着被你所拯救
[03:20.560]但是每次你的离去
[03:25.520]世界都会由黎明进入黑夜
[03:30.640]如果我能于天空中游弋
[03:36.080]届时会有人注意到我吗
[03:41.280]在沉沦中
[03:44.160]挥之不去的是你的身影
[03:51.280]传来的悲歌催我泪下
[03:56.320]瓶中之语再无传达之时
[04:01.440]在沉沦中
[04:04.160]挥之不去的是你的身影
